title: Legacy (disambiguation)
content:
'''Legacy''' may refer to:

===Ships===
*[[Legacy (Star Destroyer)|''Legacy'' (Star Destroyer)]]
*[[Legacy (Darrus Jeht)|''Legacy'' (Darrus Jeht)]]
*''[[Arkanian Legacy]]''
*''[[Jaster's Legacy]]''
*''[[Legacy of Torment]]''
*''[[Sea Legacy]]''
*''[[Legacy Run]]''

===Other===
====Lightsaber crystals====
*[[Kenobi's Legacy]]

====Locations====
*[[Sebulba's Legacy/Legends|Sebulba's Legacy]]

====Laws====
*[[Legacy world]]

==Real world==
===Television episodes===
*"[[Legacy (episode)|Legacy]]," the eleventh episode of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' [[Star Wars Rebels Season Two|Season Two]].
*"[[Legacy (Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian episode)|Legacy]], the second episode of ''[[Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian]]''.
*"[[Legacy of Terror]]," the seventh episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]].

===Audio dramas===
*"[[Legacy (German audio drama)|Legacy]]," an adaptation of the ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' [[Legacy (episode)|episode]] of the same name

===Comics===
*''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', a comic series created by [[John Ostrander|Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema|Duursema]].
*''[[Star Wars: Legacy—War]]'', a six issues sequel of the first Legacy.
*''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 2]]'', a sequel of the first Legacy created by [[Corinna Bechko|Bechko]] and [[Gabriel Hardman|Hardman]].

===Documentaries===
*[[The Force Is with Them: The Legacy of Star Wars|''The Force Is with Them: The Legacy of'' Star Wars]]

===Eras===
*The [[Legacy era]]

===Magazine articles===
*''[[A Legacy of Starships]]''
*''[[Vader's Legacy]]''

===Multimedia===
*''[[The Clone Wars Legacy]]'', a multimedia project continuing the animated series; ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''.

===Novels===
*[[Legacy (novel)|''Legacy'']]
*[[Legacy (audiobook)|''Legacy'' (audiobook)]]
*The ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]''
*''[[Legacy of Doom]]'' (canceled)

===Video games===
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Legacy of the Sith]]'', an expansion for the video game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.
